DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-22-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS- DEFENDANT REVENUE RECOVERY BUREAU INCORPORATED DOING BUSINESS AS PROVIDER RECOVERY, JOSEPH GAYDOS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. FACTS REGARDING OBESITY AFFECTING BODILY SYSTEM OR LIMITING A MAJOR LIFE ACTIVITY IF CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH. OVERRULED AS TO 2ND, 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION. WORKERS COMPENSATION DOES NOT APPLY TO DAMAGES CAUSED OUTSIDE THE NORMAL RISKS OF THE EMPLOYMENT RELATIONSHIP. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES L. WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR# 1558 =(301/JLW/DM)
